title: About Peter
meta_description: A former Merseyside County Councillor and leader of Sefton Council, Peter Dowd is the Labour MP for Bootle. He currently serves as Shadow Chief Secretary to the Treasury.
text_excerpt: About Peter Peter Dowd Home About Gallery Contact Privacy Notice My work in the community My work in Parliament My views Home About Gallery Contact Peter Dowd Labour Member of Parliament for Bootle Privacy Notice My work in the community My work in Parliament My views About Peter I have been involved in our community for over 40 years in various public roles within the Council, Fire and Rescue Service, NHS and Education and Social Care Services. My roots are deep within our local communities and I intend them to remain that way. I believe that my experiences of working across various public bodies, the voluntary, charity and faith sectors, as well as links with trade unions and the business sector, have given me an insight into the pressures, challenges and issues affecting our people and our communities. My role is to be a champion and voice for our communities in Westminster.
